title: URSSAF artist-author
subtitle: Estimate your social contributions, anticipate deadlines and prepare your quarterly filing.

sim.heading: Contribution simulator
sim.sub: Adjust the declared amount: the breakdown recalculates live.
sim.note: Indicative 2026 rates for an artist-author declaring as salary-type income.

deadlines.heading: Quarterly deadlines
deadlines.sub: Filing and payment on the 15th of the month following each calendar quarter.

declaration.title: Generate my pre-filled filing
declaration.body: Day 1 assembles your quarterly author-rights income into the URSSAF form, ready to review and submit.
declaration.dialogSub: Check these amounts before submitting — demo document.
declaration.disclaimer: Working document: does not replace the official filing on urssaf.fr.

note.title: The artist-author status in short
note.body: Your author rights (SACEM, publishing, sync) fall under the French artist-author social scheme, managed by Urssaf Limousin: roughly 16.3% in contributions, filed every quarter. Live fees and neighbouring rights (ADAMI, SPEDIDAM) belong to other schemes and are not included here.

labelTable.heading: Contributions per artist
labelTable.sub: Each artist-author files individually — consolidated roster view.
